caption: Just remember this …The right view can change everything! If you’re visiting NYC soon and THIS is your aesthetic, I created two 7 day NYC itineraries that will save you hours of planning and show you the spots locals gatekeep. One is tailored to the holidays and the other is designed for any season!  #nyctravel #nycluxury #placestogoinnyc #cuteplacestogoinnyc #bestnycbars
